summary.zh: From gate to drumbeat to modern structure—unlock Beijing’s sense of order in three missions.
summary.en: From gate to drumbeat to modern structure—unlock Beijing’s sense of order in three missions.

zh: Complete one puzzle per stop to earn a badge
Offline reading supported; AR will be added next
en: Complete one puzzle per stop to earn a badge
Offline reading supported; AR will be added next

desc.zh: You decoded the first signal of the gate.
desc.en: You decoded the first signal of the gate.

desc.zh: You heard the rhythm of the old capital.
desc.en: You heard the rhythm of the old capital.

desc.zh: You found modern order inside woven steel.
desc.en: You found modern order inside woven steel.

desc.zh: You completed the 3-stop Central Axis quest.
desc.en: You completed the 3-stop Central Axis quest.

arriveHint.zh: Stand in an open spot and avoid strong glare or backlight.
arriveHint.en: Stand in an open spot and avoid strong glare or backlight.

scanHint.zh: For the MVP, tap “Start puzzle” to continue; AR will be added next.
scanHint.en: For the MVP, tap “Start puzzle” to continue; AR will be added next.

intro.zh: Welcome to Qianmen Arrow Tower. Mission one: read order through the gate’s structure and position.
intro.en: Welcome to Qianmen Arrow Tower. Mission one: read order through the gate’s structure and position.

arBeat.zh: Imagine a defense line expanding from the gate. Find why it exists.
arBeat.en: Imagine a defense line expanding from the gate. Find why it exists.

short.zh: The Drum Tower is an important cultural symbol on the central axis.
short.en: The Drum Tower is an important cultural symbol on the central axis.

arriveHint.zh: Stay near the plaza or entrance for an easier read and puzzle solving.
arriveHint.en: Stay near the plaza or entrance for an easier read and puzzle solving.

scanHint.zh: For the MVP, tap “Start puzzle” to continue; AR will be added next.
scanHint.en: For the MVP, tap “Start puzzle” to continue; AR will be added next.

intro.zh: The Drum Tower is an important cultural symbol on the central axis. Decode how time organized city life.
intro.en: The Drum Tower is an important cultural symbol on the central axis. Decode how time organized city life.

arBeat.zh: Imagine beats as a rhythm ring—linking everyone’s daily life.
arBeat.en: Imagine beats as a rhythm ring—linking everyone’s daily life.

short.zh: Structure as aesthetics: a symbol of modern public space.
short.en: Structure as aesthetics: a symbol of modern public space.

arriveHint.zh: Stand where the woven steel façade is clearly visible.
arriveHint.en: Stand where the woven steel façade is clearly visible.

scanHint.zh: For the MVP, tap “Start puzzle” to continue; AR will be added next.
scanHint.en: For the MVP, tap “Start puzzle” to continue; AR will be added next.

intro.zh: You’ve passed the gate and the drumbeat. Final chapter: find modern order in woven steel.
intro.en: You’ve passed the gate and the drumbeat. Final chapter: find modern order in woven steel.

arBeat.zh: See the steel as breathing fabric—structure becomes the surface.
arBeat.en: See the steel as breathing fabric—structure becomes the surface.

question.zh: In a city defense system, what is the Arrow Tower primarily used for?
question.en: In a city defense system, what is the Arrow Tower primarily used for?

hints.zh: Look at the key words: “arrow” and “tower.”
hints.en: Look at the key words: “arrow” and “tower.”

hints.zh: It relates to firing positions, lookout, and defense—not ceremonies or commerce.
hints.en: It relates to firing positions, lookout, and defense—not ceremonies or commerce.

explain.zh: The Arrow Tower is a key defensive node of the city gate system, combining lookout and protection.
explain.en: The Arrow Tower is a key defensive node of the city gate system, combining lookout and protection.

question.zh: Before phones and personal clocks, how did a city broadcast time to everyone?
question.en: Before phones and personal clocks, how did a city broadcast time to everyone?

choices.zh: Public signals like drums and bells
choices.en: Public signals like drums and bells

hints.zh: Think about what “drum tower / bell tower” means as a pair.
hints.en: Think about what “drum tower / bell tower” means as a pair.

hints.zh: Public sounds had the widest reach—an ancient notification system.
hints.en: Public sounds had the widest reach—an ancient notification system.

explain.zh: Drums and bells broadcast time and civic order through public signals.
explain.en: Drums and bells broadcast time and civic order through public signals.

question.zh: The Bird’s Nest’s signature structural aesthetics come from what?
question.en: The Bird’s Nest’s signature structural aesthetics come from what?

hints.zh: Does the façade look woven like a nest, or stacked like masonry?
hints.en: Does the façade look woven like a nest, or stacked like masonry?

hints.zh: Material and structure directly become the visual expression.
hints.en: Material and structure directly become the visual expression.

explain.zh: Its iconic look comes from interwoven steel—structure as aesthetics.
explain.en: Its iconic look comes from interwoven steel—structure as aesthetics.
